categories.title: Golden Kodee for Creativity
categories.description: Celebrating the most creative and innovative use of Kotlin in a project or library.

nominees.name: Aaron Todd
nominees.bio: Aaron is a senior software engineer at AWS, where he works on the AWS SDK for Kotlin. He is passionate about building developer tools and making cloud development more accessible.
nominees.projectDescription: A multiplatform SDK that brings the full power of AWS services to Kotlin developers with idiomatic coroutine-based APIs.

nominees.name: Brian Norman
nominees.bio: Brian works on the Kotlin compiler at JetBrains, focusing on language features and performance improvements.
nominees.projectDescription: A Kotlin compiler plugin that provides detailed assertion messages by transforming assert calls at compile time.

nominees.name: Chet Haase
nominees.bio: Chet is an engineering lead at Google, focused on Android developer experience and Jetpack Compose.
nominees.projectDescription: A creative set of animation utilities and examples showcasing the power of Jetpack Compose's animation system.

categories.title: Golden Kodee for Community Impact
categories.description: Recognizing outstanding contributions to the Kotlin community through talks, articles, and open-source work.

nominees.name: Dave Leeds
nominees.bio: Dave is an author and educator who has helped thousands of developers learn Kotlin through clear, practical content.
nominees.projectDescription: A comprehensive reference guide for Kotlin developers, covering language features with practical examples.

nominees.name: Elena Marchetti
nominees.bio: Elena is a developer advocate at JetBrains who organizes community events and creates educational content for Kotlin developers.
nominees.projectDescription: A worldwide initiative to bring KotlinConf content and community meetups to developers everywhere.

nominees.name: Frank Sommers
nominees.bio: Frank is a longtime JVM community leader who has championed Kotlin adoption through editorial content and conference presentations.
nominees.projectDescription: A curated collection of real-world Kotlin migration stories and best practices from industry leaders.

categories.title: Golden Kodee for Best Library
categories.description: The most impactful open-source Kotlin library of the year.

nominees.name: Grace Chen
nominees.bio: Grace is a prolific open-source contributor focused on building multiplatform Kotlin libraries.
nominees.projectDescription: A library that simplifies using Kotlin coroutines from Swift code in Kotlin Multiplatform projects.

nominees.name: Heidi Zhang
nominees.bio: Heidi works on mobile infrastructure at Square, with a focus on build tooling and developer productivity.
nominees.projectDescription: A library for building StateFlow streams using Jetpack Compose's compiler and runtime.

nominees.name: Ivan Petrov
nominees.bio: Ivan specializes in backend systems and has contributed to multiple Kotlin server-side frameworks.
nominees.projectDescription: A Gradle plugin for Kotlin code coverage, supporting JVM and multiplatform projects.

categories.title: Golden Kodee for Rising Star
categories.description: A newcomer who made a big splash in the Kotlin ecosystem this year.

nominees.name: Judy Kim
nominees.bio: Judy is an Android developer at Lyft who quickly became known for her contributions to the Kotlin community through blog posts and conference talks.
nominees.projectDescription: A set of testing utilities that simplify UI testing for Jetpack Compose applications.

nominees.name: Karl Weber
nominees.bio: Karl is a computer science student whose open-source Kotlin projects have gained significant traction in the developer community.
nominees.projectDescription: An interactive environment for experimenting with KotlinDL, making machine learning accessible to Kotlin developers.

nominees.name: Liam O'Brien
nominees.bio: Liam is a full stack developer who bridges the gap between Kotlin backend and frontend development using Kotlin/JS and Kotlin/Wasm.
nominees.projectDescription: A collection of demos and templates showcasing Kotlin/Wasm capabilities for web development.
